name: Report Purchase Invoice VS  Purchase Receipt
report_name: Report Purchase Invoice VS  Purchase Receipt
query: SELECT pi.name AS "Purchase Invoice:Link/Purchase Invoice:200", pi.supplier AS "Supplier:Link/Supplier:300", pii.item_code AS "Item:Link/Item:150", pii.qty AS "Qty:Float:80", pii.amount AS "Amount:Currency:150", CASE WHEN pri.receipt_qty IS NOT NULL THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS "Purchase Receipt:HTML:150", IFNULL(pri.receipt_qty, 0) AS "Qty Received:Float:200", CASE WHEN pi.update_stock = 1 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS "Update Stock:HTML:150" FROM `tabPurchase Invoice` pi JOIN `tabPurchase Invoice Item` pii ON pi.name = pii.parent LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pri.item_code, pri.purchase_invoice, pri.purchase_order, SUM(pri.qty) AS receipt_qty FROM `tabPurchase Receipt Item` pri WHERE pri.purchase_invoice IS NOT NULL GROUP BY pri.purchase_invoice, pri.item_code ) pri ON pri.purchase_invoice = pi.name AND pri.item_code = pii.item_code WHERE pi.docstatus = 1 ORDER BY pi.posting_date DESC;

name: Sales Invoice Base On Branch
query:
SELECT
    si.posting_date AS "Date:Date:100",
    si.name AS "Invoice:Link/Sales Invoice:120",
    si.customer AS "Customer:Link/Customer:150",
    si.cost_center AS "Cost Center:Link/Cost Center:120",
    ii.item_code AS "Item:Link/Item:150",
    ii.item_name AS "Item Name:Data:180",
    ii.qty AS "Qty:Float:80",
    ii.rate AS "Rate:Currency:100",
    ii.amount AS "Amount:Currency:120",
    si.status AS "Status:Data:100"
FROM
    `tabSales Invoice` si
INNER JOIN
    `tabSales Invoice Item` ii ON ii.parent = si.name
WHERE
    si.docstatus != 2
    AND (si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s OR %(from_date)s IS NULL)
    AND (si.cost_center = %(cost_center)s OR %(cost_center)s IS NULL OR %(cost_center)s = '')
ORDER BY
    si.posting_date DESC, si.name DESC

name: Sales Invoice Payment
query:
SELECT
    si.name AS "Sales Invoice:Link/Sales Invoice:200",
    si.customer AS "Customer:Link/Customer:200",
    si.pos_profile AS "POS Profile:Link/POS Profile:300",

    COALESCE(sip.mode_of_payment, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pe.mode_of_payment)) AS "Mode of Payment::200",
    COALESCE(sip.amount, SUM(per.allocated_amount)) AS "Payment Amount (SAR):Currency:200",

    si.grand_total AS "Grand Total (SAR):Currency:200",
    si.outstanding_amount AS "Outstanding Amount (SAR):Currency:200"

FROM
    `tabSales Invoice` si

LEFT JOIN
    `tabSales Invoice Payment` sip ON sip.parent = si.name

LEFT JOIN
    `tabPayment Entry Reference` per ON per.reference_name = si.name AND per.reference_doctype = 'Sales Invoice'
LEFT JOIN
    `tabPayment Entry` pe ON pe.name = per.parent AND pe.docstatus = 1

WHERE
    si.docstatus = 1

GROUP BY
    si.name
ORDER BY
    si.posting_date DESC
